source_old_req: The SBC_32F411EDISCOVERY system component and its implementations SBC_32F411EDISCOVERY.RTOS, SBC_32F411EDISCOVERY.impl, and SBC_32F411EDISCOVERY.v2 must operate under legitimate operational scenarios for all external interactions at the system boundary. The system shall maintain end-to-end directional consistency and type consistency for all connections. For the SBC_32F411EDISCOVERY.v2 implementation, the following guarantee statements apply: the accelerometer data outputs from LSM303DLHC (acc_out_data_x, acc_out_data_y, acc_out_data_z) shall be correctly transmitted through ports ACC_PC1, ACC_PC2, and ACC_PC3 to the corresponding inputs of the Software process (acc_in_data_x, acc_in_data_y, acc_in_data_z); the magnetometer data outputs from LSM303DLHC (mag_out_data_x, mag_out_data_y, mag_out_data_z) shall be correctly transmitted through ports MAG_PC1, MAG_PC2, and MAG_PC3 to the corresponding inputs of the Software process (mag_in_data_x, mag_in_data_y, mag_in_data_z); and the gyroscope data outputs from L3GD20 (gyro_out_data_x, gyro_out_data_y, gyro_out_data_z) shall be correctly transmitted through ports GYRO_PC1, GYRO_PC2, and GYRO_PC3 to the corresponding inputs of the Software process (gyro_in_data_x, gyro_in_data_y, gyro_in_data_z). Additionally, the end-to-end flow etef1 shall ensure that the latency of data transmission from LSM303DLHC.f1 through ACC_PC1 to Software.f1 is within the range of 40 ms to 90 ms. All data types shall be of type AHRS::Data_Types::FLOAT32_TYPE_AADL.
natural_requirement: The SBC_32F411EDISCOVERY component shall use the deployment bindings defined for SBC_32F411EDISCOVERY.RTOS. The deployment mapping shall bind Software to processor cpu.

requirement_items.text: The SBC_32F411EDISCOVERY.RTOS implementation shall bind Software to processor cpu.
requirement_items.source_text_before_behavior_style_rewrit: The SBC_32F411EDISCOVERY.RTOS implementation shall assign Actual_Processor_Binding as (reference(cpu)) applies to Software.

quality_policy.traceable: Every item has trace_refs and expected_check metadata tied to AADL facts.
quality_policy.principle: Every generated sentence must name an explicit property assignment or structural connection; ordinary feature declarations are not used as rebuilt requirements.

natural_requirement_before_behavior_styl: The SBC_32F411EDISCOVERY.RTOS implementation shall assign Actual_Processor_Binding as (reference(cpu)) applies to Software.

behavior_style_policy.basis: front-110 AGREE-derived requirements favor implementable behavior, constants, assumptions, guarantees, routing, and bounded properties.
behavior_style_policy.rule: Do not describe unsupported validity/legal-boundary semantics unless the AADL model exposes variables, values, or properties that can implement them.

natural_requirement_before_paragraph_rew: The SBC_32F411EDISCOVERY.RTOS implementation shall bind Software to processor cpu.

paragraph_style_policy.rule: Req.txt is written as a natural-language requirement paragraph; per-item traceability stays in requirement_items.
paragraph_style_policy.basis: Front-110 AGREE-derived requirements generally combine function, assumptions, guarantees, and implementation notes into 1-4 sentence paragraphs.
